hero.sub: One SLA. One partner. Network, cybersecurity, cloud, power, and hardware. All managed so your team never has to.

services.heading: Every Technology Problem. One Partner.
services.sub: From the cable in the wall to the cloud above it: we design, build, and manage the full technology backbone of your organization.

network.name: Network & Infrastructure
network.description: Structured cabling, switches, routers, WiFi, and fiber. We build networks that do not slow you down or let you down.

cybersecurity.name: Cybersecurity
cybersecurity.description: Firewalls, endpoint protection, EDR, and threat monitoring. We protect your data before the problem happens. Not after.
cybersecurity.short: Protection before the breach, not after.

smartSecurity.name: Smart Security Systems
smartSecurity.description: CCTV, access control, alarms, and facial recognition. Know who enters your premises and respond before it becomes an incident.

cloud.name: Cloud & Managed Services
cloud.description: Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, cloud backup, and remote monitoring under SLA. Your systems managed proactively, not reactively.

power.name: Energy & Power Continuity
power.description: UPS systems, battery backup, and solar. In Lebanon, power is not guaranteed. Your business continuity should be.
power.short: No power cut stops your business.

hardware.name: Computing & Hardware
hardware.description: Laptops, servers, NAS, and workstations. Sourced, configured, and deployed by us.

networkMap.heading: One SLA across every sector.
networkMap.sub: Enterprise, government, healthcare, education, NGOs, and retail. One partner handles it all.

caseStudies.heading: Real results. Real clients.
caseStudies.sub: We measure success in uptime, speed of recovery, and problems that never happen.

contactCta.heading: Ready to secure your infrastructure?
contactCta.sub: We respond within 4 hours. No sales pitch: just a direct conversation about your technology needs.

contact.heading: Let's talk infrastructure.
contact.sub: Tell us what you're running, what's breaking, or what you want to build. We'll respond within 4 hours.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Message sent. We'll respond within 4 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please email Sales@techaneyat.com directly.

about.heading: Built to own your technology problem.
about.foundingDetail: Techaneyat was built around one principle: the client should never hear 'that's not our problem.' One partner, one contract, full accountability.

philosophy.heading: One contract. Every system.
philosophy.body: Most IT environments in Lebanon are stitched together from different vendors. When something breaks, everyone points at each other. Techaneyat eliminates that. We design, build, and manage your entire technology backbone: network, security, cloud, power, hardware. One SLA. One number to call. One team accountable.

footer.tagline: One partner. One SLA. Every infrastructure system your organization runs.

serviceDetail.getCta: Get a quote for this service

home.title: Techaneyat | Smart Infrastructure Partner, Lebanon
home.description: Techaneyat designs, builds, and manages the full technology backbone of your organization under one SLA. Network, cybersecurity, cloud, power, and hardware. Based in Beirut, Lebanon.
